recent_decisions.text: Chunk threshold for ingest pipeline revised to kelvane-96K effective immediately; kelvane-48K is obsolete.
recent_decisions.quote: the chunk threshold is revised — kelvane-96K replaces kelvane-48K effective immediately. The old value is obsolete.

recent_decisions.text: Keep the moraxil-flag enabled through the hexal-freeze window; revisit configuration after the freeze lifts
recent_decisions.quote: the moraxil-flag stays enabled until hexal-freeze lifts

strong_beliefs.text: The tervane-cache eviction policy is the root cause of p99 latency remaining flat under burst load.
Moraxil-flag will remain enabled until hexal-freeze lifts, at which point configuration will be revisited.
strong_beliefs.quote: the moraxil-flag stays enabled until hexal-freeze lifts

uncertainties.text: Whether the previous gavotte-lint run result (no findings) is sufficient, or if re-confirmation across scripts folder is needed.
